description: Cross-reference of split panel PNGs under docs/assets/panels/ to visual content and suggested documentation placement. Paths are relative to docs/assets/ (use as assets/panels/... from Markdown under docs/).

content.title: Tekton-DAG (full logo)
content.summary: Mascot (red ninja, yellow hard hat, wrench) behind a colored DAG diagram, framed by a gear; wordmark Tekton-DAG below.

suggestedPlacement.section: Top of root README or docs hero
suggestedPlacement.rationale: Primary project identity; use anywhere a full logo is appropriate.
High-recognition brand lockup.

content.title: Robot operator + pipeline from START to success
content.summary: Robot at laptop; flowchart from green START through colored task blocks (gears) to checkmark finish; city/cloud background.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Shows end-to-end flow from trigger to completion.
Friendly overview of running a pipeline.

content.title: Multi-level DAG + segmented progress bar
content.summary: Hierarchical colored nodes (gear= icons) with dependencies; multi-color progress bar; robot points at status.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Visual for stacked tasks and dependency flow.
Relates run status to graph shape.

content.title: Terminal run status + background DAG
content.summary: Foreground terminal with checkmarks and in-progress spinner; background workflow graph (gear nodes, colored states).

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Links concrete CLI/run output to logical pipeline graph.
Demos and recordings mirror 'definition vs run'.

content.title: Task status dashboard (A–E)
content.summary: Robot points at UI with Task A Running, B Success, C Failed, D Completed, E Pending.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Illustrates per-task states operators see in a GUI.
Visual for pipeline outcome vocabulary.

content.title: Getting Started (ninja + laptop DAG)
content.summary: Ninja engineer at desk with laptop showing DAG, manual with gears, tools; banner text 'Getting Started'.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Explicit 'Getting Started' label matches section intent.
Sets tone for docs landing.

content.title: Installation
content.summary: Ninja with servers, USB drives, download folder, progress arrows; banner 'Installation'.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Visual for install/bootstrap topics.
Matches labeled section.

content.title: User Guide
content.summary: Ninja behind open book: checklist page, DAG page, tools; banner 'User Guide'.

suggestedPlacement.section: Documentation map / how to read docs
suggestedPlacement.rationale: Meta illustration for 'using the docs'.
Checklist + DAG matches onboarding narrative.

content.title: API Documentation
content.summary: Ninja at laptop with DAG on screen, books, coffee, binary motif; banner 'API Documentation'.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Extension and API topics.

suggestedPlacement.section: Deep-dive / integration APIs (if you add API sections there)
suggestedPlacement.rationale: API / reference tone; pair with real endpoint docs when they exist.

content.title: Getting Started (light banner)
content.summary: Title 'Getting Started'; small ninja with hard hat and wrench beside laptop showing code; gear silhouettes.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Cleaner variant than four-panel 'Getting Started' for inline docs.

content.title: Installation — pip install tekton-dag
content.summary: Title 'Installation'; terminal window with command `$ pip install tekton-dag`.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Exact command shown in art; only use if doc matches (adjust caption if package name differs).

suggestedPlacement.section: Install subsection where pip is accurate
suggestedPlacement.rationale: Pair image with same command in text.

content.title: User Guide (checklist + DAG board)
content.summary: Title 'User Guide'; ninja reading book; clipboard checklist; five-node DAG diagram.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Checklist + graph fits verification discipline.
Procedure-oriented illustration.

content.title: Architecture
content.summary: Labeled boxes: Tekton-DAG → DAG Engine → Tekton Pipelines, Tasks, Local Runner; solid and dashed feedback arrows.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Complements C4 text with stylized component view.
Multi-component system story.

suggestedPlacement.section: System role of DAG vs runners
suggestedPlacement.rationale: Shows engine vs pipelines vs local execution.

content.title: Pipeline Flow
content.summary: Start → three parallel Task nodes → Merge → End; gear motif.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Classic fork/join pipeline story.
Matches narration about linear + parallel steps.

content.title: Local Execution
content.summary: Title 'Local Execution'; ninja at laptop with server racks and gears.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Emphasizes on-machine runs.
Distinguishes local execution from production cluster.

content.title: Examples (Build / Test)
content.summary: Ninja at whiteboard: Build Python + green bar; Test list with status squares.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Build+test examples narrative.
Concrete workflow examples.

content.title: CI/CD Integration
content.summary: GitHub → Docker ← layered stack icon; ninja at laptop; gears.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Source + image + deploy stack story.
External tool integration.

content.title: Tekton-DAG horizontal banner
content.summary: Chibi ninja + wrench; wordmark Tekton-DAG; small three-node DAG icon.

suggestedPlacement.rationale: Wide aspect fits horizontal slots; smaller than full 1024 logo.
Optional illustration for Pages doc.
